target_vertical: Real Estate / Commercial / Residential / General Contractor

agent_mapping.Hunter-Scout: Deal Finder (MLS, county records, bid boards)
agent_mapping.Forge-Sanitizer: Bid Machine (SOW, pro forma, code compliance)
agent_mapping.Social-Daemon: The Closer (direct mail, agent outreach, follow-up)
agent_mapping.Veto-Gate: Compliance Officer (Fair Housing, licensing, margin protection)
agent_mapping.Healer-Daemon: Project Recovery (schedule drift, budget overrun, inspection failure)
agent_mapping.Security-Janitor: Document Auditor (insurance, lien waivers, permits, contracts)
